description: Verify secretary-led intent restatement, first-principles context intake, versioned human confirmation, and execution blocking before project context is ready.

command: set -euo pipefail; test -f agent-system/web/app/index.html; grep -q 'confirmProjectIntent' agent-system/web/app/assets/index-*.js; grep -q 'confirmProjectContext' agent-system/web/app/assets/index-*.js; grep -q 'updateProjectContext' agent-system/web/app/assets/index-*.js; grep -q 'uploadKnowledge' agent-system/web/app/assets/index-*.js; grep -q 'secretary-intake-toolbar' agent-system/web/app/assets/index-*.css
